mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room_members (chat_room_id, user_id, joined_at) VALUES (#{chatRoomId}, #{userId}, #{joinedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, chat_room_id, user_id, last_read_message_id, last_read_at, joined_at, left_at FROM chat_room_members WHERE chat_room_id = #{chatRoomId} AND left_at IS NULL

SELECT r.id AS chat_room_id, r.type AS chat_room_type, r.challenge_id AS challenge_id, r.direct_chat_key AS direct_chat_key, r.created_at AS room_created_at, m.last_read_message_id AS last_read_message_id, m.last_read_at AS last_read_at, lm.id AS last_message_id, lm.sender_id AS last_message_sender_id, lm.content AS last_message_content, lm.message_type AS last_message_type, lm.deleted_at AS last_message_deleted_at, lm.created_at AS last_message_created_at FROM chat_room_members m JOIN chat_rooms r ON r.id = m.chat_room_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT id, sender_id, content, message_type, deleted_at, created_at FROM chat_messages WHERE chat_room_id = r.id ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) lm ON true WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} AND m.left_at IS NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(lm.created_at, r.created_at) DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_members WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND left_at IS NULL
